name: Village in the Woods (WIP)
description:
Live in a neat little village in the woods <3
_____________________________________

Moving homes has always been a pain. The last neighbourhood hadn't been the best, and honestly, city life is getting tiring. The solution? Move to a cute little cabin somewhere in a forest. Sure, it might be dangerous, but it could also be super fun. After all, your neighbours are friendly, but maybe there's more to them than meets the eye.
creator: Minxie_Lynxie
